title: Ticket Triage Standup
text:
## Ticket Triage Standup

**Facilitator:** {person}

**Total tickets:** {number}, not counting the one labeled my {object} is haunted.

**Priority one:** {adjective} outage preventing a {job} from {verb ending in -ing} near {place}.

**Priority two:** User wants a {color} laptop because it feels more {emotion}.

**Blocked by:** Vendor, {plural noun}, and a dashboard that {past-tense verb} {adverb}.

**Action items:** {verb} the queue, assign the {adjective} tickets, and bring {food} before everyone makes a {sound}.
